title: beyond_the_skybox
description:
A broken story full of broken truths. A story of a treacherous tragedy displayed and shown in the form of dimensions and events. Something happened, that was never meant to be.

Breach the sky, Breach the truth.
body:
# *DISCLAIMER*
THIS MOD HAS HEAVY FLASHING LIGHTS THAT MAY BE UNSUITABLE FOR PEOPLE WITH PHOTOSENSITIVITY.



This mod was heavily inspired based off of TBoTV/mark101 ARG series.

Singleplayer and multiplayer work fine.

This was a purely solo project done by me.



Community

If you want current updates, sneak peaks and even suggest something of your own and maybe make it to the mod, join the discord!

Discord : [beyond_the_skybox discord](https://discord.gg/RM54Kcct6V)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## OFFICIAL PLAYLIST
*With help of Obscl_lrity*
[beyond_the_skybox official playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcPicq77FOTlf23bwyGSdzWiVXaEDBuPa)


The mod includes:

22 entities

35 events

12 structures

26 dimensions

1 Storyline

SOUND TRACK CREDITS GOES TO MARK101 AND HIS AMAZING ARG!

[BaronOfSomething's playthrough](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7SgKkA0UlIA)




thanksks for supporintg g mym modmddd
